hooks.command: if [ -f agent_board.py ]; then echo '=== Agent Board ==='; python3 agent_board.py list --status claimed 2>/dev/null; python3 agent_board.py list --status in_progress 2>/dev/null; python3 agent_board.py list --status blocked 2>/dev/null; echo "Tip: claim a task before editing — 'python3 agent_board.py claim T-XXX --agent <you>'"; fi

python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, os
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
except Exception:
    sys.exit(0)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if 'git commit' in cmd and os.path.exists('agent_board.py'):
    r = subprocess.run(
        ['python3', 'agent_board.py', 'validate',
         '--statuses', 'claimed,in_progress,blocked',
         '--require-next', '--require-handoff'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    if r.returncode != 0:
        print(r.stdout, file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(2)
"
